headline: Oil Services Are on the Edge and OIH Could Be the Most Explosive Energy ETF This Week
summary: The VanEck Oil Services ETF (NYSEARCA:OIH) gives energy investors broad exposure to the drilling cycle without picking individual stocks in one of the market’s most volatile corners. Right now, that exposure matters. OIH is up roughly 39% year to date through February 27, with more than 15% of that gain coming in the past month ... Oil Services Are on the Edge and OIH Could Be the Most Explosive Energy ETF This Week

headline: Aalo Atomics Taps Baker Hughes to Supply Steam Turbine for Aalo-X Nuclear Reactor; Collaboration Represents Next Step on Aalo’s Path to Full Power Operation
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 04, 2026--Aalo Atomics, the company building fully modular nuclear plants to power modern AI data centers (XMRs), has selected Baker Hughes, an energy technology company, to provide it with a 10 MWe steam turbine generator set and associated ancillary systems. The steam turbine will be used for the power island of Aalo-X, Aalo’s experimental reactor, and will put Aalo squarely on the path to being one of the first advanced reactors to power a data center.

raw.headline: Aalo Atomics Taps Baker Hughes to Supply Steam Turbine for Aalo-X Nuclear Reactor; Collaboration Represents Next Step on Aalo’s Path to Full Power Operation
